title: Retired Jekyll Studio Home Shell
summary: Retired the old Jekyll `/studio/` landing shell now that the local Studio app owns `/studio/`.
effect: The public/Jekyll site no longer has a Studio home shell to publish. The local app remains the `/studio/` owner, and its home view now exposes only runtime-visible navigation entries while filtering out internal non-nav views such as the per-series tag editor.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app view and navigation smoke files
